skills.name: frontmcp-setup
skills.description: Domain router for project setup and scaffolding — new projects, project structure, Nx workspaces, storage backends, multi-app composition, and the skills system. Use when starting or organizing a FrontMCP project.

skills.name: frontmcp-development
skills.description: Domain router for building MCP components — tools, resources, prompts, agents, providers, jobs, workflows, and skills. Use when starting any FrontMCP development task and need to find the right skill.

skills.name: frontmcp-deployment
skills.description: Domain router for shipping MCP servers — deploy to Node, Vercel, Lambda, Cloudflare, or build for CLI, browser, and SDK. Use when choosing a deployment target or build format.

skills.name: frontmcp-testing
skills.description: Domain router for testing MCP servers — unit tests, E2E tests, coverage, and quality assurance. Use when starting any testing task for a FrontMCP application.

skills.name: frontmcp-config
skills.description: Domain router for configuring MCP servers — transport, HTTP, throttle, elicitation, auth, sessions, and storage. Use when configuring any aspect of a FrontMCP server.

skills.name: frontmcp-guides
skills.description: End-to-end examples and best practices for building FrontMCP MCP servers. Use when starting a new project from scratch, learning architectural patterns, or following a complete build walkthrough.

skills.name: frontmcp-production-readiness
skills.description: Production readiness audit for FrontMCP servers — security hardening, performance optimization, reliability patterns, observability, and deployment best practices.
